query:
Your agent ID: 437-investigator

Bug report (GH Issue #437): recurring_friction and dead_knowledge extractors write KM signals to ENTRIES instead of maintenance_recommendations.

Two extractors produce ProposedEntry objects written to ENTRIES as lesson-learned entries:
- crates/unimatrix-observe/src/extraction/recurring_friction.rs
- crates/unimatrix-observe/src/extraction/dead_knowledge.rs

Fix needed: route both to maintenance_recommendations, remove ENTRIES write path, quarantine existing background-tick entries.

Related: #430 (same wrong write path class).

Prior knowledge (Unimatrix #3252): ExtractionRule must not perform side effects.

Tasks:
1. Read both extractor files
2. Trace call chain from extractor to ENTRIES write
3. Find where maintenance_recommendations is populated
4. Propose minimal fix with specific file/function changes
5. Identify missing tests

Write agent report to /workspaces/unimatrix/product/features/bugfix-437/agents/437-investigator-report.md
Post diagnosis as GH Issue #437 comment

entries.title: ExtractionRule vs maintenance action: additive rules must not signal deprecation (GH #351)
Bug fix agents must write report files even when Unimatrix entries are confirmed in return values
Security reviewer must verify artifact paths exist before cold-read orientation
